metadata.heist_focus: light-cone avoidance, rune-lamp sabotage, mirror-route handoffs, and synchronized scouting
metadata.coordination_problem: visibility puzzle with optional alarms that reward simultaneous lamp sabotage and distraction
metadata.goblin_aesthetic: brass lanterns, soot-black mirrors, stolen wick wax, purple boggart shadows, and dwarf beardglass prisms

entry_warren.name: Goblin Entry Warren
entry_warren.description: A cramped goblin approach lined with brass lanterns, soot-black mirrors, stolen wick wax, purple boggart shadows, and dwarf beardglass prisms.

mischief_lane.name: Mischief Lane
mischief_lane.description: The main coordination lane for light-cone avoidance, rune-lamp sabotage, mirror-route handoffs, and synchronized scouting.

objective_hold.name: Ember Lens Post
objective_hold.description: Steal the ember lens from the lampwright dais without letting the rune lamps box in the carrier.

furniture.name: Sooty Blackout Curtain
furniture.description: Sooty Blackout Curtain supports light-cone avoidance, rune-lamp sabotage, mirror-route handoffs, and synchronized scouting.

furniture.message: The curtain swallows a goblin-shaped lump of trouble.

break_effect.message: Sooty Blackout Curtain breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Beardglass Rune Lamp
furniture.description: Beardglass Rune Lamp supports light-cone avoidance, rune-lamp sabotage, mirror-route handoffs, and synchronized scouting.

furniture.message: The kobold turns the lamp's rune from glare to gutter.

break_effect.message: Beardglass Rune Lamp breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Crooked Mirror Rack
furniture.description: Crooked Mirror Rack supports light-cone avoidance, rune-lamp sabotage, mirror-route handoffs, and synchronized scouting.

furniture.message: The mirror rack now points every dwarf at the wrong shadow.

break_effect.message: Crooked Mirror Rack breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

scripts.coordination_contract: visibility puzzle with optional alarms that reward simultaneous lamp sabotage and distraction

achievements.title: Quiet Toolwork
achievements.description: Resolve a mechanism or alarm feature in Beardglass Lampworks pico without turning the run into a brawl.

achievements.title: Mischief Coordination
achievements.description: Create a distraction or trap setup that opens the Beardglass Lampworks route.

achievements.title: Snack Tax With Interest
achievements.description: Take optional loot while still completing the pico heist.
